recommendations.title: Blitz
recommendations.overview: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Tightrope
recommendations.overview: Wes Block is a detective who's put on the case of a serial killer whose victims are young and pretty women. The murders are getting personal when the killer chooses victims who are acquaintances of Block. Even his daughters are threatened.

recommendations.title: Woman of the Hour
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer in '70s LA when they're cast on an episode of "The Dating Game."

recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A troubled and violent detective investigates a series of serial killer murders in Memphis, Tennessee.

recommendations.title: My All American
recommendations.overview: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

recommendations.title: Suspect Zero
recommendations.overview: A killer is on the loose, and an FBI agent sifts through clues and learns that the bloodthirsty felon's victims of choice are other serial killers.

recommendations.title: Natural Born Killers
recommendations.overview: Two victims of traumatized childhoods become lovers and serial murderers irresponsibly glorified by the mass media.

recommendations.title: Angel
recommendations.overview: Molly Stewart, a teen at the top of her class who survives by working nights as a prostitute on Hollywood Blvd, finds her world beginning to fall apart when a depraved, necrophiliac serial killer begins targeting LA’s streetwalkers.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.
